introduction_text:
Welcome! Complete this short form to pre-register your visit.

What to keep ready: a valid government ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, or Driving License) and a recent photo of yourself. Your visitor type has been pre-set by your host — you don't need to change it.

Once you submit, your host will be notified for approval. You'll receive an email and can show that confirmation at the gate when you arrive.
name: visitor-pre-registration-form
success_message: Your pre-registration has been received successfully. Our team will review it and continue the visitor approval process.
title: Visitor Access Pre-Registration
